role: Data Science Team Leader (AI Engineering Lead)
description: Managing a cross-timezone AI engineering team (8 reports across India & UK) building the Generative AI document parsing pipeline. Reduced processing cost from ~$1 to $0.05 per document (20× reduction). Delivered 5× throughput improvement across three architectural iterations. Published first-author research on arXiv.

Led platform performance team with delivery ownership and people management responsibilities. Achieved 30% reduction in regression incidents through shift-left quality practices and distributed load testing infrastructure.

Managed cross-functional team of 10–12 engineers through major revamps of a high-risk global financial platform. Owned end-to-end hiring, performance reviews, and career coaching. Defined HLD/LLD standards achieving 60% performance improvement. Delivered high-scale solutions for a $11B client.

Progressed from intern to Module Lead over 6 years. Built 65-screen Activity Center with 100 + business events display under aggressive deadlines. Engineered data migration tools with 4–6× speed improvements across 10 million records.
